summary: Notifications System Enhancement - All tests passed. Backend: 11/11 (100%). Frontend: All notification features working correctly including filters, stats, CRUD operations, and UI components.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns all expected fields with correct types (total_suppliers, total_products, unread_notifications, etc.)
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns list of notifications with id, type, message, read, created_at fields
Backend: GET /api/notifications?unread_only=true filters only unread notifications
Backend: GET /api/notifications/stats returns statistics by type (sync_complete, sync_error, stock_out, stock_low, price_change, woocommerce_export)
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read marks notification as read and persists
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/{fake_id}/read returns 404 for non-existent notification
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read
Backend: DELETE /api/notifications/{fake_id} returns 404 for non-existent notification
Backend: DELETE /api/notifications?read_only=true deletes only read notifications
Backend: GET /api/notifications without auth returns 401/403
Backend: GET /api/notifications/stats without auth returns 401/403
Backend: config.py centralizes MongoDB and notification thresholds (PRICE_CHANGE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT, LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD)
Frontend: Notifications page loads at /notifications with title and subtitle showing total/unread counts
Frontend: Type filter dropdown (data-testid='type-filter-btn') shows all notification types (Sincronización, Error, Sin stock, Stock bajo, WooCommerce, Cambio precio)
Frontend: Read/Unread filter buttons work (data-testid='filter-all', 'filter-unread')
Frontend: Actions dropdown shows 'Marcar todas como leídas' and 'Eliminar leídas' options
Frontend: Stats cards display notification counts by type when notifications exist
Frontend: Notification items show message, product name, type badge with color, timestamp
Frontend: Unread notifications have blue indicator dot
Frontend: Clicking notification marks it as read
Frontend: Delete button (X) appears on hover for each notification
Frontend: Empty state shows when no notifications exist
critical_code_review_comments: config.py properly centralizes all MongoDB and notification configuration
services/sync.py uses PRICE_CHANGE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT and LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD from config.py
All notification endpoints in routes/dashboard.py handle CRUD operations correctly with proper error responses
Frontend Notifications.jsx has all required data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Created 6 test notifications (2 read, 4 unread) for UI testing: sync_complete, price_change, stock_out, stock_low, sync_error, woocommerce_export
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notifications system fully working. Key data-testid attributes: notifications-title, type-filter-btn, filter-all, filter-unread, actions-dropdown, notification-{id}, delete-notification-{id}, stat-card-{type}. Config thresholds: PRICE_CHANGE_THRESHOLD_PERCENT=10.0, LOW_STOCK_THRESHOLD=5. Notification types: sync_complete, sync_error, stock_out, stock_low, price_change, woocommerce_export
